Role Definitions
Super Admin
✓ Full system access
✓ Manage users & roles
✓ Change app settings
✓ Backup & restore data
✓ View all registers
✓ Export & import data
✓ Delete any record
Admin
✓ Full clinical register access
✓ Add/edit/delete records
✓ View admin panel
✓ Manage users (Staff only)
✓ Export & import data
✗ Change app settings
✗ Backup & restore data
✗ Create Super Admin accounts
Staff
✓ View dashboard
✓ Patient registry (add/edit)
✓ Chemotherapy register
✓ ADR reporting
✓ Extravasation & spill logs
✗ Admin panel access
✗ Delete records
Role permissions are enforced at login. Changing a user's role takes effect at their next sign-in.
